{{Quote|Hello customer! Buy from Mic'Tunan'Jus and save your credits!|Mic'Tunan'Jus greeting [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|translated=1|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
'''Mic'Tunan'Jus Orgu''' was a [[Paaerduag]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]]. Around [[3956 BBY]], he took up residence in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Orgu had a kiosk set up in [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation's]] [[Docking Bay 32|docking bay]], plying their wares to travelers. The merchant was able to come into possession of the legendary [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Yusanis]]'s [[Yusanis's Brand|Brand]] after his [[Death/Legends|death]].
